emails.subject: Confirmation
emails.body: Dan, Southern Co. has agreed to these changes and is willing to sign. You might want to wordsmith. Lets discuss. Thanks. Forwarded by Phil DeMoes/Corp/Enron on 05/01/2001 10:59 AM Phil DeMoes 04/30/2001 02:05 PM

emails.subject: Re: Confirmation
emails.body: Re: Confirmation Phil, The language is okay. Please have them print execution copies, sign and send to us for final signature. Phil DeMoes@ENRON 05/01/2001 11:00 AM
